nasb.text: Thus Joash the king did not remember the kindness which his father Jehoiada had shown him, but he murdered his son. And as he died he said, “May the Lord see and avenge!”

esv.text: Thus Joash the king did not remember the kindness that Jehoiada, Zechariah’s father, had shown him, but killed his son. And when he was dying, he said, “May the Lord see and avenge!”

cnv.text: 約阿施王沒有記念撒迦利亞的父親耶何耶大對他所施的恩，反而殺了他的兒子。撒迦利亞臨死的時候，說：“願耶和華鑒察，並且責問你！”

ccb.text: 约阿施王不但不顾念撒迦利亚的父亲耶何耶大对他的恩惠，还杀死了耶何耶大的儿子。撒迦利亚临死的时候说：“愿耶和华鉴察，为我申冤！”
